name: Task selection and state update

data.label: Adapt this Start text to the project/agent. Use the current state as the default input. summary stores condensed past context, and new_events stores recent unsummarized { action, observation, reward } events.
Add agent_latest_observation and agent_latest_reward to new_events.
Update summary with a concise summary of summary plus new_events.
Use only the current state to update the remaining fields. Leave unchanged values untouched and only fill fields supported by the current state.
Measure whether summary plus new_events exceeds 4000 characters.
Choose one complete task when the simulation starts.
data.description: Return exactly one randomly sampled complete task row.

data.label: Prepare the sampled task and task id for state storage.
Load only the trajectory associated with the sampled task.
data.description: Return the hidden price trajectory whose task_id matches the sampled task.

data.label: Set the selected task and associated trajectory in state.

freeText: Editable starter state template. Adapt the Start text and downstream prompts to the project/agent while preserving the first ingress append Code node unless the project genuinely needs a different deterministic ingress append.
